title: Will you miss the Walkie-Talkie Apple Watch app when watchOS 27 drops push-to-talk?
summary: Apple Watch is losing its Walkie-Talkie app in this fall’s watchOS 27 software update. Will you miss the Apple Watch push-to-talk functionality?
